Samsung/SK Hynix深化3-5年LTA（10-30%预付款+价格地板条款）。微软3年DDR5数百亿刀+谷歌5年通用DRAM。FT定性'producer's market'至2028
PCIe4 TLC 主源价格提取离线第9天。HTTP 200但3 bytes raw。浏览器自动化是唯一恢复路径

escalatedRisks.risk: PCIe4 TLC brand split 3.6x (Samsung PM1733 vs Solidigm)
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung PM1733 7.68TB $1,037-$2,351 vs Solidigm D7-P5520 $3,750-$6,505 = 3.6x品牌裂口。连续4天多源确认结构性特征。不同品牌对应不同市场层级(OEM bulk vs channel/retail)
escalatedRisks.confidence: medium-high (confirmed 4 consecutive days, 3+ independent data points)

escalatedRisks.detail: Kingston DC3000ME $14,959(SHI) + Micron 9550 Pro $17,700(SS, Day 2 confirmed non-isolated) + 🆕Micron 9550 Pro $16,939(Xi Computer, ships May 18) + Micron 9550 Pro $19,573(SHI)。Midpoint unchanged。SS $17,700 Day 2 sustained — $17,700 not single-day anomaly。Xi $16,939 new mid-band reference。
escalatedRisks.confidence: medium-high (dual-source stable, single-source price change needs cross-validation)

escalatedRisks.detail: Micron 6500 ION (TLC but positioned as QLC competitor) EOL confirmed: last order 2026/8/25, last ship 2027/2/25. 30.72TB供方将从D5-P5316+6500 ION双源缩为D5-P5316单一源。中长期收紧QLC 30.72TB供给
escalatedRisks.confidence: high (Micron official EOL announcement via distributor)

escalatedRisks.source: Newegg + ServerSupply + Mouser + Wiredzone + Best Buy
escalatedRisks.detail: 五源溢价带 $24,600-$32,309 第10天。Tom's Hardware + TechRadar 双媒体独立验证。🆕全时间序列建立: 2024 $3,692→2026 May $24,600-$32,309 (523-776% increase)。全表最强列地位无人能及。
主流媒体正式命名'RAMageddon'——DDR5翻3-4倍，$500以下PC或2028消失。Market narrative从行业专报→主流公众
AI DRAM+NAND需求2026年将超记忆体总TAM的50%。AI仍处'极早期'。供给紧张至少至2028
NAND现货累计下跌30-40%，合同价Q2 +70-75% QoQ不变。史上最大spot-contract背离。企业SSD按contract价成交，spot跌不降低采购成本
A-Tech DDR5-6400 64GB旧产品URL返回404。同品牌DDR5-5600 64GB listing仍在($1,629)。品牌整体在售

escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED 🔧 — Day 2 confirmed non-isolated, Xi Computer new third source
escalatedRisks.detail: ServerSupply Micron 9550 Pro 30.72TB $17,700 Day 2 sustained — price increase confirmed not single-day anomaly。🆕Xi Computer Micron 9550 Pro $16,939 (ships May 18) provides mid-band cross-validation。SHI Kingston $14,959 + Micron $19,573 unchanged。Midpoint unchanged at $16,329.50→¥132,759。
